description_long: This object is a wooden bowl with a unique spiral or volute design, reminiscent of classical architectural elements. The bowl's body is smoothly rounded, with a continuous, thick rim that curls inward in a tight spiral, creating a visually striking focal point. The wood grain is clearly visible, giving the surface a natural, warm appearance. One side of the bowl extends into a flat, elongated section with a groove running along its length, possibly for decorative or functional purposes. The interior of the spiral is hollow, forming the main receptacle area, while the exterior is smoothly finished. The overall craftsmanship suggests a blend of utility and ornamental value, suitable for both practical and decorative urban settings.
description: A wooden bowl with a spiral volute design and an extended grooved section, featuring a smooth, natural wood finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the spiral bowl form and the elongated, grooved extension.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the depth of the spiral and the open groove along the extension.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the continuous spiral and the flat extension.
description_view_3: Top-down angled view revealing the hollow spiral interior and the full length of the grooved extension.
attribute_location: kitchen countertop or dining table in a modern or classical urban home
attribute_context_of_use: serving or displaying food, or as a decorative centerpiece
